title: Doxantha elongata
taxonomy: Doxantha elongata is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Doxantha. The classification of Doxantha elongata places it within the order Magnoliales and the subclass Magnoliidae. At the kingdom level, it is classified as a plant within the kingdom Plantae. Further classification groups it as a dicotyledonous angiosperm.
